title: Asia markets tumble as Middle East conflict spiral with no sign of abating
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets tumbled Monday as investors weighed escalating tensions in the Middle East after the U.S. and Iran threatened to intensify military hostilities.
summary_public: Asia-Pacific markets tumbled Monday as investors weighed escalating tensions in the Middle East after the U.S. and Iran threatened to intensify military hostilities.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran threatened to intensify military hostilities
